title: SimpleSilkSpawners
description: Simple to use, easy to install, bare bones Silk Spawners plugin for paper & Spigot.
body:
**Simple Silk Spawners**
**✅ Simple. Lightweight. No dependencies.**

Simple Silk Spawners is an easy-to-install plugin that enables players to collect mob spawners using Silk Touch. Perfect for survival servers that want a straightforward, no-fuss solution.

**Features**
Silk Touch Spawner Drops
Break any spawner with a diamond or netherite pickaxe enchanted with Silk Touch to collect it.
No configuration required, just install and go!
⚒️ Spawner Retrieval Command
Use /getspawner <type> to obtain any spawner type instantly (requires permission).
Simple Permissions
Silk Touch Permissions:
silkspawners.type.<type>
Allows a player to collect spawners of a specific entity type (e.g., silkspawners.type.zombie).
Get Spawner Permissions:
silkspawners.get.<type>
Allows a player to use /getspawner <type>.
No dependencies
No extra libraries, no configuration files – plug and play.
Commands

**Command Description**
/getspawner <type> Give yourself a spawner of the given entity type.
⚙️ Installation
Download the plugin .jar file.

Place it into your server's /plugins folder.

Restart or reload your server.

Enjoy!
Example Usage
To get a Zombie Spawner:

/getspawner zombie

(Requires silkspawners.get.zombie permission)

To allow a player to collect Skeleton Spawners with Silk Touch:

silkspawners.type.skeleton
**Supported Versions**
✅ Compatible with Spigot and Paper 1.21.5+

Simple Silk Spawners – Keep it simple. No clutter. Just functional Silk Touch spawner drops.
